history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man wearing a black hooded sweatshirt and black shorts stands on a rocky shore, facing the ocean. He holds a long, thick wooden stick in his right hand, resting it on the rocks. His left hand is extended towards the water, his index finger pointing as if interacting with the waves. He wears white slides on his feet. The ocean is a vibrant blue, with white foam and ripples from the gentle waves crashing against the shore. In the distance, the horizon is clear, with a faint line of land or mountains visible, and a soft gradient of blue and pale orange in the sky, suggesting either sunrise or sunset. The lighting is warm and golden, casting soft shadows on the rocks and highlighting the texture of the water. The overall mood is serene and contemplative, with a sense of peaceful solitude. The style is realistic, with a focus on natural light and atmospheric perspective. --ar 9:16 --style raw
